creator: aseelye@eltopia.com
text:
Current port references a version roughly a year old.  Patch below upgrades to latest version available.

Fix: PORTNAME=      mediaproxy
-PORTVERSION=   1.7.2
+PORTVERSION=   1.8.2
 CATEGORIES=    net
-MASTER_SITES=  http://mediaproxy.ag-projects.com/old/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://mediaproxy.ag-projects.com/
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

 MAINTAINER=    steve@energistic.com
